overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dimly lit industrial service corridor at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features high concrete walls topped with chain-link fencing, large overhead pipes, and warm artificial wall lights contrasting against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with overhead cooling pipes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the overhead red and gray pipes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow industrial corridor flanked by high concrete walls topped with chain-link fencing. Overhead, large red and gray pipes span the corridor against a dark night sky. Warm artificial lights mounted on the walls cast pools of yellow light on the dirt ground as the camera approaches the overhead pipe structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor continuing past overhead pipes toward distant exit

events.description: camera passes directly underneath the overhead red and gray pipes

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the corridor after passing under the pipes, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: faintly lit exit or opening at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the overhead pipe structure, the camera continues down the industrial corridor. The pipes now recede behind as the camera advances toward a distant lit opening. The concrete walls continue on both sides with periodic wall lights and graffiti, maintaining the enclosed industrial atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow industrial corridor that transitions from a confined space under heavy piping toward a distant, lit opening. It begins by advancing between high concrete walls topped with chain-link fencing, where warm artificial lights cast yellow pools across the dirt ground. As the camera moves forward, it passes directly beneath a network of large red and gray overhead pipes that span the dark night sky. The scene then opens up as the pipe structure recedes behind the viewer, continuing along the graffiti-covered walls and periodic lighting. The movement finally pushes deeper into the enclosed industrial atmosphere, steadily approaching the glow of a far-off exit.
